text.title: Prototyping Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid prototype-plan artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "proto-onboarding-2026-05-23", "owner": "Maria Yuskiv <maria@faion.net>", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "learning_objectives": ["Can users complete onboarding without help?", "Which step has highest drop-off?"], "fidelity": "clickable", "in_scope": ["welcome screen", "account creation", "payment"], "out_of_scope": [{"item": "settings page", "reason": "not on critical path"}], "tasks": [ {"scenario": "You just downloaded the app. Get to a point where you can start using it.", "goal": "complete onboarding", "success_criterion": "reaches Home tab", "review_status": "human-reviewed"}, {"scenario": "You decide to upgrade to paid.", "goal": "upgrade", "success_criterion": "reaches confirmation", "review_status": "human-reviewed"}, {"scenario": "You forgot your password mid-onboarding.", "goal": "recover password", "success_criterion": "reaches reset", "review_status": "human-reviewed"} ], "decision_rule": "Move to dev if >=4/5 participants finish unassisted AND no severity-1 finding." }

example.note: Owner plural; fidelity not in enum; objectives empty; task is instruction-based; minItems violated.

forbidden.pattern: Task scenario contains "click X" or "navigate to Y" instead of situation + goal.
Any task with `review_status == "agent-draft"` shipped to participants.
Empty `out_of_scope` array — out-of-scope items must be named explicitly.
